eval.question: Run a daily health check on site 151734: active alarms, battery state, solar performance today.
eval.expected_behavior: - Runs the three widget calls in parallel when possible (MCP supports it). - Consolidates findings into a single health summary with sections: Alarms / Battery / Solar. - Identifies any anomalies (SOC under threshold, alarms present, abnormal production). - Does not make any destructive call — this is pure reporting.
